# MuleSoft MCP Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.6) of MCP Connector documentation.
> See [MCP Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the MCP Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [MCP Connector 1.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure MCP Connector 1.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-acb.md)
- [MCP Connector 1.6 - Applying Security to the MCP Server](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-config-topics.md)
- [MCP Connector 1.6 - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-examples.md)
- [MCP Connector 1.6 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure MCP Connector 1.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-studio.md)
- [Upgrading MCP Connector to Version 1.6](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-upgrade-migrate.md)
- [MCP Connector 1.6 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/mcp-connector/latest/mcp-connector-xml-maven.md)
